name: Pineapple Sweet Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil sweet potatoes until tender.
2. Peel the sweet potatoes and let them cool slightly.
3. Mash the sweet potatoes until smooth.
4. Stir in the remaining ingredients, including syrup from pineapple tidbits.
5. Return to stove and reheat.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE + ½ FRUIT EXCHANGE
CAL: 122
